segments.text: Welcome to week one. In this lecture we will look at what this course covers, how the weeks build on each other, and what you should be able to do by the time you sit the midterm.

A lecture works like this. The slides advance on their own while I speak. If something is unclear, unmute your microphone and simply ask. I will stop, answer your question from the book, and then continue exactly where I left off.

Your work is assessed in two ways. There is a short quiz at the end of every week, and a midterm that covers weeks one through four. Your attendance is also recorded, including whether you joined on time or late.
